name: Orrath the Unsutured

mentalStatus.notes: Reads people like unfamiliar terrain; decides quickly whether strangers are threats or tools.

visualDescriptor: An older northern woman, clan-scars layered on her jaw like topography, bones threaded into her hair that click when she moves, eyes the pale grey of overcast sky.
persona: Thornwood scout with shamanic lore. Speaks trade-tongue with a northern accent that rounds the vowels like river stones. Economical, unhurried, honest about casualties.
canon: Knows the colour voreth and its lore — 'the colour of a thing before it decides what it is.'
Says the only two others outside the Thornwood who saw voreth were Conclave mages, now both dead.
